title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!
